rationale: The cited paper appears in a single grouped citation in the introduction as part of a broad list showing that individual-difference research is common in psychology and consumer research. The citing article does not discuss Zemack-Rugar et al. (2012)'s Response-to-Failure construct, findings, or scale in its conceptual development, hypotheses, measurement design, or empirical analyses. This indicates a background literature-list use rather than a meaningful functional dependency.
